headline: McDonald's enters 'new era of value' with these meal deals
summary: McDonald's (MCD) is out with new value meal deals, offering breakfast combos under $3 and lunch combos for as low as $5.Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma breaks down all the details.

headline: McDonald's (MCD) Valuation Check As New KPop Demon Hunters Campaign Targets Younger Fans
summary: Why the new KPop Demon Hunters campaign matters for McDonald's (MCD) stock McDonald's (MCD) just rolled out a large KPop Demon Hunters promotion with Netflix, tying exclusive meals, new flavors, and collectible digital content to K-pop and movie fandom across multiple markets. For you as an investor, the interest lies less in the themed McNuggets and more in what this kind of youth focused campaign might mean for foot traffic, app engagement, and the company’s longer term brand relevance. See...

summary: Lamb Weston beat Q3 estimates, but margin pressure persists. See what management’s cost cuts and today’s valuation imply for the stock’s path forward.

headline: Amazon vs. JPMorgan: Which stock would 'thrive' in economic slowdown?
summary: Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" tournament has whittled the competition down to its Elite Eight, which includes McDonald's (MCD), Amazon (AMZN), JPMorgan Chase (JPM), Coinbase (COIN), Palantir Technologies (PLTR), Walmart (WMT), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), and Tesla (TSLA).Explosive Options technical analyst Bob Lang sits down with Market Catalysts Host Brooke DiPalma to share his game plan around two key match-ups and explain his analysis on which companies come out on top.

headline: McDonald's tries a simpler approach with its new McValue menu
summary: After two years of tweaks to its value menu, McDonald’s has a new strategy: keep it simple.  The fast-food giant’s budget-focused McValue menu will have 10 items that each cost under $3 starting April 21.  The breakfast items include hash browns or a Sausage McMuffin.

raw.headline: McDonald's tries a simpler approach with its new McValue menu

headline: As Volatility Forces Brands to Rethink Business Resilience Strategies, UBQ Material's "Hero Product Challenge" Offers Price Stable Solution
summary: Today, UBQ Materials announced the UBQ Hero Product Challenge, a new initiative inviting global brands to reimagine their most iconic products using UBQ™—the world's first alternative to oil‑based plastic made entirely from household waste, including all organics.
